## Description

<!-- Provide a brief summary of the changes -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Build/infrastructure change

## Related Issues

<!-- Link to related issues, e.g., "Fixes #123" -->

## Testing Performed

<!-- Describe the testing you've done -->

- [ ] Ran `gmake check_repo` or `gmake check_run`
- [ ] Ran `gmake tests_repo` or `gmake tests_run` (if modifying tests)
- [ ] Ran `gmake catalog_build` (if modifying database or test metadata)
- [ ] Tested manually with sample configurations

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project style (naming, formatting, comments)
- [ ] All backup files (`.orig`) are included for modified existing files
- [ ] Documentation is updated (README.md, ChangeLog.md if applicable)
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] No debug code or commented-out sections remain
- [ ] Line endings are LF (not CRLF)
- [ ] No unintended whitespace changes
